steps.t: Cariad will be waiting for you outside of Tornhad, south of the river. You should meet up with him.
It seems Cariad has not escaped the sharp eyes of the Rangers. You should talk to Lagordal outside Tornhad.
With Cariad captured, the next thing to do would be to notify Erlys. She can be found in the Cuan-lûth Refuge, to the north of Tornhad.
